nasb.text: “The Lord is righteous; For I have rebelled against His command; Hear now, all peoples, And behold my pain; My virgins and my young men Have gone into captivity.

esv.text: “The Lord is in the right, for I have rebelled against his word; but hear, all you peoples, and see my suffering; my young women and my young men have gone into captivity.

cnv.text: 耶和華是公義的，他這樣待我，是因為我違背了他的命令。 萬民哪！請你們聽我的話！看看我的痛苦！ 我的少女和青年人都已經被擄去了。

ccb.text: “但耶和华是公义的， 因为我违背了祂的命令。 万国啊，请听我的话， 看看我的痛苦！ 我的年轻男女都被掳去。
